Data Diode DD500E

Data Diodes

# Data Diode DD500E

## Tailor-made for industrial use

DD500E is a unique and compact data diode for applications requiring physically guaranteed one-way data flow. Also available for railway trackside installations.

![Advenica data diode ](/media/lcjndtdp/hero-image-dd500e-product-page.jpg?width=624&height=450&v=1dcbd1eff6cef30)

[Contact us](#contact)
[See specifications](#specifications)

The robust design combined with the compact form factor makes this the no1 choice for [industrial](#industrial "#industrial") & [railway trackside](#dd500er "#dd500er") installations.

## The world's first data diode of its kind

DD500E is the world's first data diode of its kind, tailor-made for industrial organisations that can now feel secure knowing that their critical data is safeguarded against cyber threats.

![Advenica data diode ](/media/ddrpy3bv/hero-image-product-page-6.png?width=1000&height=563&v=1dcbd1ef87e5650)


![Advenica data diode ](/media/u5sbip5v/hero-image-dd500e-nr-2-product-page-624x450.png?width=700&height=525&v=1dcbd1f10a30ff0)

## Bridging the air-gap

Extract sensor or other operational data from field devices to any local or cloud platform without compromising the integrity or availability of the source network.

The Advenica Data Diode DD500E enables use cases such as data analysis for predictive maintenance, live monitoring of sensor data, statistics data collection or machine-to-machine communication within a production environment.

### Tailored for industrial use

Designed for industrial networks, the DD500E securely transfers MQTT messages or UDP data across security boundaries while helping protect brokers, control systems, and connected devices from direct access.

With its robust DIN rail-mounted design, the DD500E is engineered to provide reliable operation in demanding industrial environments.

### Low-touch installation

IP connectivity capabilities enables a smooth integration in existing network environments which is unique for a small form factor data diode.

With PoE (Power over Ethernet) as a power supply option, the model design facilitates installation in settings with restricted space in challenging environments.

![Advenica data diode ](/media/u5sbip5v/hero-image-dd500e-nr-2-product-page-624x450.png?width=700&height=525&v=1dcbd1f10a30ff0)

### Low-touch installation

IP connectivity capabilities enables a smooth integration in existing network environments which is unique for a small form factor data diode.

With PoE (Power over Ethernet) as a power supply option, the model design facilitates installation in settings with restricted space in challenging environments.

![Advenica data diode ](/media/htxjgzyg/hero-image-product-page-16.png?width=600)

### Data Diode DD500E-R

This trackside-certified variant extends our proven data diode platform DD500E to railway infrastructure environments. It provides secure, hardware-enforced one-way data transfer from sensitive rail systems while maintaining strict network isolation.

Designed for demanding installations in trackside equipment cabinets and aligned with railway standards EN 50121-4 and EN 50125-3, this data diode enables operators to safely export operational data such as telemetry and diagnostics for external monitoring, analytics, and predictive maintenance applications.

Key features include:

·       **Maintains Network Isolation**: Enables export of operational data while preserving the air gap of sensitive railway systems.

·       **Designed for Trackside Deployment**: Developed for railway infrastructure environments and aligned with EN 50121-4 (EMC) and EN 50125-3 (trackside environmental conditions).

·       **Extended Operating Temperature Range**: Reliable operation from -40 °C to +70 °C, suitable for installation in railway trackside equipment cabinets and other protected outdoor enclosures.

·       **Operational Data Availability**: Allows secure transfer of telemetry, diagnostics, and status data to external systems.

·       **Supports Monitoring and Maintenance Applications**: Enables real-time monitoring and data collection for analytics, condition monitoring, and predictive maintenance.

·       **Proven Platform**: Based on the same reliable architecture and feature set as the established DD500E.

• > Small footprint, easy to deploy, and tough enough for demanding environments. It’s the kind of product you install and don’t have to worry about again.
  >
  > System Architect, Infrastructure Customer
• > Given the sensitivity of their operations, our customers demand proven, hardware-based protection. The DD500E gave them the confidence to approve our solution.
  >
  > Product Owner, Machine Builder

![Windpower](/media/sgiocnsw/adobestock_1147214492.jpeg?rxy=0.7581222370252815,0.4768634105529418&width=506&height=506)

## Secure export of data from vital environments

• Real-time monitoring
• Predictive maintenance
• Machine-to-machine communication

DD500E also work great as a part of our solution [Secure Machine Connection](/products-and-solutions/solutions/secure-machine-connection/ "Secure Machine Connection").

## How our customers use DD500E

• [![Protecting information in critical infrastructure ](/media/0vbosohe/blog-header\_-adobestock\_168201631.jpg?width=800&height=600&v=1dc128048ca3ec0)

  ### Protecting information in critical infrastructure

  ### 5 things you can use a data diode for

  There are more ways to use a data diode than you might think. You can use them for countless solutions, but here are five ways you may not have known about. Read more](/learning-centre/articles/5-things-you-can-use-a-data-diode-for/)

## Physical separation of industrial networks

70°C
Max operating temperature

175g
Minimal size

100
Mbps network interface

<0.01%
Packet loss rate

### Key features

• Physically separated source and destination networks
• Compact form factor
• Low touch installation process
• IP connectivity capabilities
• Native support for UDP and MQTT

### Technical brief

• DIN rail mounting
• Power over Ethernet (PoE), class 2
• 100 Mbps network interfaces
• Certifications for industrial and railway infrastructure environments
• Certifications include CE, UKCA, FCC and UL safety standards
